qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.c_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.d_dictado FROM CYD02_DICTADOS WHERE CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_curso = {#SOURCE:@oi_curso} AND CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado = {#SOURCE:@id} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.c_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.d_dictado FROM CYD02_DICTADOS WHERE CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_curso = {#SOURCE:@oi_curso} AND CYD02_DICTADOS.c_dictado = {substring_before(#SOURCE:@CODE,\'-\')} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.c_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.d_dictado FROM CYD02_DICTADOS WHERE CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_curso = {#SOURCE:@oi_curso} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Dictados.DICTADO\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
